title: Module 1.3: Beam Hazard Calculations
subtitle: Master NOHD, NHZ, and Safety Zone Calculations
description: Learn to calculate Nominal Ocular Hazard Distance (NOHD), Nominal Hazard Zone (NHZ), and understand beam propagation with interactive calculators and visual demonstrations. Based on ANSI Z136.1 and laser safety best practices.
learning_objectives: Calculate NOHD for CW and pulsed lasers using the correct formulas
Determine Nominal Hazard Zone (NHZ) boundaries for laser installations
Apply MPE values to calculate safety distances
Visualize beam divergence and hazard zones
Select appropriate control measures based on calculated hazard distances
